rows.label: tev000101_MSG0001
rows.name:
As you explore the administrative
district, think about what sort of
life you'd like to lead here in NLA.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000101_MSG0002
rows.name:
Take all the time you need. I'll be
right here whenever you're ready.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000101_MSG0007
rows.name:
Installing data probes is one of
BLADE's most fundamental duties.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000101_MSG0008
rows.name:
But that's a lesson that's perhaps best
taught in the field. I'd like you to
accompany Elma to see exactly what I mean.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000101_MSG0009
rows.name:
This'll be your first BLADE mission. You can
expect to be compensated if it's completed to
our satisfaction. Now show us what you can do.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000101_MSG1001
rows.name:
Ah, [ST:playername ]! Just the BLADE
I've been looking for.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000101_MSG1002
rows.name:
I've been thinking I'd like to join your
team. You know, get out there and experience
the daily grind of a BLADE operative.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000101_MSG1003
rows.name:
Sitting behind a desk all day dulls a person's
senses, and I can't afford to let those—or my combat
skills— fall into disarray. So what do you think?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000101_JNK0010
rows.name: Accept

rows.label: tev000101_SEL0011
rows.name: Add Nagi to your team.

rows.label: tev000101_JNK0020
rows.name: Refuse

rows.label: tev000101_SEL0021
rows.name: Decline Nagi's request for now.

rows.label: tev000101_MSG1004
rows.name:
Excellent. Then from this point forth,
I'll be an acting member of your
team. Command me as you see fit.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000101_MSG1005
rows.name:
Is that so? Well, I'm sorry to
hear that. If you change your mind
later, my request still stands.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000101_MSG1010
rows.name:
There is still so much we don't
fully understand, but nonetheless,
the Growth are defeated.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000101_MSG1011
rows.name:
And as secretary of defense, that has
lightened my workload significantly.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000101_MSG1012
rows.name:
Which means I'm now free to
tromp about Mira just like
any other BLADE operative![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000101_MSG1013
rows.name:
If you have an opening on your team, I'd
be grateful for the chance to fill it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000101_JNK0170
rows.name: Accept

rows.label: tev000101_SEL0171
rows.name: Add Nagi to your team.

rows.label: tev000101_JNK0180
rows.name: Reject

rows.label: tev000101_SEL0181
rows.name: Decline Nagi's request for now.

rows.label: tev000101_MSG1015
rows.name:
Is that so? Well, I'm sorry to
hear that. If you change your mind
later, my request still stands.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000101_MSG1018
rows.name:
Good to see you're back safe and
sound. Please report to Director
General Chausson immediately.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000101_MSG1019
rows.name:
I must refrain from participating
in team activities until you've
issued your report.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000101_MSG1020
rows.name:
Unfortunately, the director
general and I have some
important matters to discuss.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000101_MSG1021
rows.name:
I'm confident you'll be able to
complete your missions without me.[ST:wait ]
